name: Mushroom, Turkey and Swiss Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Swiss cheese (thin slices; about 1 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Wipe mushrooms clean and trim stems; slice.
3. Heat oil in a small skillet. Add mushroom slices and cook over high heat for 2 minutes, shaking the skillet. Reserve.
4. Cover pizza shell with turkey slices. Top with mushroom slices and tomato. Sprinkle with pepper to taste and 1½ teaspoons parsley.
5. Top with cheese. Bake 8-10 minutes, or until cheese is golden and bubbly. Garnish with remaining parsley. Serve immediately.
